$comment: Manifest consumed by vcpkg only; not a published port. The name/version-string fields are required by the schema but unused at build time. The veriparse artifact version comes from `git describe` at packaging time, not from this file. The builtin-baseline pins the vcpkg ports tree used for version resolution; keep it in sync with vcpkgGitCommitId in .github/workflows/release.yml.
name: veriparse
